jsonLd.title: FreshToHome is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!
